Perfect match to the canonical sigma70 -35 consensus TTGACA (minus35_score=1.0 at pos 0).
TTTAAT, a strong sigma70 -10 variant (5/6 to TATAAT consensus; minus10_pos=23, spacer_len=17, optimal spacing).
